content.query:
SELECT TOP (100) [id]
,[job_id]
,[PmtAmount]
,[PmtDate]
,[pmt_id]
,[pmm_id]
,[ARBatchNo]
,[ARBatchDate]
,[ARBatchFlag]
,[IncBatchNo]
,[IncBatchDate]
,[IncBatchFlag]
,[EnteredOn]
,[EnteredBy]
,[LastChangedOn]
,[LastChangedBy]
,[PmtNotes]
 FROM [ODS].[LP_FHI_jbp_JobPayments] ods
 left JOIN
 (
 SELECT
[LP_JobPaymentID]
 FROM [EDW].[FACT_JOB_PAYMENT]
where [OperatingCompany] = 'FHI'
 ) edw
 on ods.id = edw.LP_JobPaymentID
 WHERE
 edw.LP_JobPaymentID is null
